name: Alphacom Holdings, Inc.
summary: Alphacom Holdings Inc., a multi-technology incubator, engages in converting technologies into commercialized forms for licensing into distribution across various industry sectors. The company is based in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong. As of February 22, 2021, Alphacom Holdings, Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Marc&Hem Publicidad S.A. de C.V.
